storyboard.content: I keep getting weird tingling and pins-and-needles feelings in both my hands and feet, especially at night
My fingers often feel numb when I wake up in the morning
I have become clumsier than usual and I drop things more often
I am having trouble doing up buttons and my handwriting has gotten harder
These symptoms have been slowly developing over the past 4 months
It is manageable but getting in the way of my work and daily life more and more
I am a 42-year-old woman and I work as an administrative assistant, which means I type a lot every day
